case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. vs. DIEHL, RAYMOND et al

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DIEHL, RAYMOND
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DIEHL, RAYMOND
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DIEHL, RAYMOND
